title: ComfyUI – LTX Video 2.3 22B FP8 (Audio-Visual)
description: ComfyUI serverless worker for LTX Video 2.3 22B FP8. Generates synchronised video + audio from a text prompt. Includes ComfyUI-Manager, ComfyUI-LTXVideo, VideoHelperSuite and ComfyMath.

input.name: Model directory
input.description: Path where model weights are stored. Point this at a network volume to avoid re-downloading on cold start.

input.name: ComfyUI directory
input.description: Path to the ComfyUI installation inside the container.

input.name: Modell-Download überspringen
input.description: Auf 1 setzen wenn Modelle bereits auf einem Network Volume liegen. Spart Zeit beim Start.
